meaning: n.(伊斯兰教什叶派支派)阿拉维派教徒
examples: Meanwhile in Homs, anti-Alawite feeling has intensified.
Even the Assads' own Alawite minority is not guaranteed to support the regime.
My host is keen to avoid the Alawite neighbourhoods but we drive past so he can point to the empty streets and shuttered Windows.
Iranians are predominately Shiites while Syria's ruling elite is most Alawite, an offshoot of Shiite Islam.
It lies on the edge of the sweeping Alawite stronghold known as al-Sahel, Arabic for coast.
